old_claim.note: Food Cold Chain provides a capability that enables this technology without being the only possible path.

new_claim_absent: No direct dependency remains because household electric refrigerators are domestic appliances; industrial refrigerated distribution is a neighboring use case rather than a construction prerequisite.

source_shape.source_locator: ASHRAE describes DOMELRE as a ready-to-use domestic electric refrigerator mounted on an ice box and plugged in, not as refrigerated transport or warehouse distribution infrastructure.
source_shape.source_claim_summary: The source supports domestic appliance scope and does not require food cold-chain systems.
source_shape.source_support_rationale: Keeping food_cold_chain direct would make downstream distribution infrastructure a prerequisite for a household device.

ontology_before: Household Electric Refrigerators depended directly on Food Cold Chain.
ontology_after: Household Electric Refrigerators depends directly on Mechanical Refrigeration and Electric Motor only.
invariant_preserved_or_changed: Changed: food_cold_chain is no longer a direct prerequisite.
would_reject_if: The node is broadened to refrigerated grocery distribution.
A dependent requires domestic refrigerators to imply supply-chain infrastructure.
A stronger source shows DOMELRE commercialization depended on existing cold-chain logistics.
short_reason: Food cold chain is distribution context, not device construction.
